content:
# Best AI Video Tools for Course Creators in 2026

Online courses are booming, but creating professional content takes time. AI tools help you create engaging courses faster!

Explore our [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/51|VEED]]: Course Video Editing Made Easy

[[link:/tools/51|VEED]] is perfect for course creators who want professional results without a production team.

### VEED for Courses
- **Auto-captions**: Essential for accessibility and learning
- **Screen recording**: Capture tutorials perfectly
- **Background removal**: Look professional anywhere
- **Audio cleaning**: Crystal clear instruction audio

---

## [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]: Turn Content into Course Videos

[[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] helps you repurpose existing content into engaging course videos.

### Pictory for Courses
- **Text-to-video**: Turn scripts into lessons
- **AI voiceovers**: Professional narration automatically
- **Auto-highlights**: Find key moments in long recordings

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price |
|------|----------|-------|
| [[link:/tools/51|VEED]] | Video editing | $12/mo |
| [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] | Content repurposing | $19/mo |
| [[link:/tools/9|Runway]] | Advanced production | $12/mo |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Getting started**: Start with [[link:/tools/51|VEED]]
- **Content repurposing**: Use [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]
- **Professional polish**: Try [[link:/tools/9|Runway]]

Ready to create amazing courses? Try these AI tools today!
